title: Functional UI
description: A small little mod giving some GUIs a gimmick
body: My goal with this mod is to add a small gimmick to each GUI. Currently supported GUIs are the Combiners (Anvil and Smithing Table), Shulker Boxes and the Grindstone with plans for more. ## Shulker Boxes Oh no, the shulkers used to construct your Shulker Box are still alive, attack the Shulker Bullets before your slots levitate away. This and other modifications to the GUIs make sure that the experience you have is *unique*.
